name: nanobanana_cinematic
description: AI-generated cinematic visuals using NanoBanana/VEO with ultra-detailed prompts

prompt_template.suffix: , filmic color grading, 24fps, professional lighting, shallow depth of field
prompt_template.negative: text overlays, watermarks, logos, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, deformed hands, blurry, low quality, pixelated, cartoon style, anime style, illustration
